explanation: An aurora dancing above the lake in mid-October.
title: Aurora over Lake Superior

explanation: Long-exposure capture from a remote ranch.
title: A Comet over Patagonia

explanation: Active region during high solar activity.
title: Sunspot Group AR3614

explanation: JWST returns a layered view of the pillars.
title: The Pillars of Creation — JWST View

explanation: Ring of fire visible from a Colorado highway.
title: Annular Eclipse over the Rockies
The Milky Way Over Connemara
explanation: Sweeping arc of our galaxy above the bogs of Connemara, Co. Galway, Ireland. No light pollution for miles west of Clifden.

title: ISS over Ireland
explanation: The International Space Station photographed as it passed over the west coast of Ireland at dusk.

title: Perseid Meteor Over Galway Bay
explanation: A bright Perseid meteor streaks above Galway Bay, captured from the Salthill promenade on a clear autumn night.

title: Aurora Borealis from Clifden
explanation: The Northern Lights appeared in Clifden skies following elevated solar activity. Rare sighting for 53°N.

title: Supernova Remnant in Cassiopeia
explanation: Colourful remnant of a massive stellar explosion observed by the Chandra X-ray Observatory.

title: Jupiter at Opposition
explanation: Jupiter at its closest approach to Earth, imaged with a backyard telescope from Salthill, Galway.

title: Orion Nebula in Hydrogen Alpha
explanation: The Great Nebula in Orion photographed through a hydrogen-alpha filter, revealing glowing gas clouds 1,300 light-years away.

title: Leonid Meteor Shower
explanation: A composite image showing the Leonid meteor shower radiating from Leo, photographed from the Connemara coast.
